title: eria soronensis
intro: Eria soronensis, also known as the Vanda soronensis, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eria soronensis include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Eria soronensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
